documentation.file_docstring: Global Plugin Hook Runner Singleton hook runner that's initialized when plugins are loaded and can be called from anywhere in the codebase.
inline_comments: Initialize the global hook runner with a plugin registry. Called once when plugins are loaded during gateway startup.
Get the global hook runner. Returns null if plugins haven't been loaded yet.
Get the global plugin registry. Returns null if plugins haven't been loaded yet.
Check if any hooks are registered for a given hook name.
Reset the global hook runner (for testing).

functions.name: initializeGlobalHookRunner
functions.doc: Initialize the global hook runner with a plugin registry.   Called once when plugins are loaded during gateway startup.

functions.name: getGlobalHookRunner
functions.doc: Get the global hook runner.   Returns null if plugins haven't been loaded yet.

functions.name: getGlobalPluginRegistry
functions.doc: Get the global plugin registry.   Returns null if plugins haven't been loaded yet.

functions.name: hasGlobalHooks
functions.doc: Check if any hooks are registered for a given hook name.

functions.name: resetGlobalHookRunner
functions.doc: Reset the global hook runner (for testing).
